title: rubus murrayi
intro: Rubus murrayi, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Rubus. It is native to the Himalayan region and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, colds, and digestive issues, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Rubus murrayi can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being.
